jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Care Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
